For Dingy Driver and Seaman Mechanic posts: Course grading of Grade-I or Grade-II is accepted.

how_to_apply: The application process for Odisha Police OSSF Ex-Servicemen recruitment 2026 requires candidates to submit a bio data and service particulars by post. There is no online application portal for this recruitment. Follow the steps below carefully.
Prepare your bio data / service particulars covering your name, rank, branch, date of discharge, age, contact details, and relevant service experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents listed in the Documents Required section above.
Address the application envelope and send it to: O/o Addl. D.G. of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar
Ensure the application reaches the office by 1 July 2026. Late applications will not be considered.
Attend the recruitment event in person at OSAP 7th Battalion, Bhubaneswar on 6th or 7th July 2026 at 09:00 AM with all original documents and self-attested copies.
O/o Additional Director General of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar.
OSAP 7th Battalion, Bhubaneswar. Nearest railway station: Bhubaneswar.

content_sections.heading: Quick Overview – Odisha Marine Police OSSF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This section provides a fast snapshot of all key details for Ex-servicemen who want to quickly assess whether they are eligible to apply for Odisha Police Marine technical posts.

rows.information: Odisha Police Coastal Security Headquarters, Bhubaneswar
Odisha Special Striking Force (OSSF), Odisha Marine Police
Master, Syrang, Engine Driver, Dingy Driver, Seaman Mechanic
Ex-Navy and Ex-Coastguard personnel retired after 01.07.2021

content_sections.heading: Odisha Marine Police OSSF Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates must keep the following dates in mind. Unlike most government recruitments, this process combines a tight application deadline with an immediate in-person recruitment event held just days after the last date.

content_sections.heading: Odisha Marine Police OSSF Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details – Post-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: Odisha Marine Police OSSF has notified approximately 120 technical posts across five categories, each requiring specific Navy or Coastguard branch experience. The post-wise vacancy and qualification details are given below. The total number of vacancies may subsequently be varied by Odisha Police Coastal Security Headquarters. These posts are for deployment at Marine Police Stations across the state of Odisha.

rows.qualification_branch_requirement: CPO/PO from Seaman and Communication branch
CPO/PO from Engineering and Electrical branch
PO and below from Engineering and Electrical branch
PO and below from any branch

content_sections.heading: Odisha Marine Police OSSF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about age, service background, medical standards, and character requirements can find all mandatory eligibility conditions for OSSF Odisha Marine Police recruitment 2026 below. All listed criteria are compulsory and non-negotiable. Only Ex-Navy and Ex-Coastguard personnel are eligible. Applicants must have experience in the Seaman, Communication, Engineering, or Electrical branches of the Indian Navy or Indian Coast Guard, relevant to the post applied for. Applicants must not have been discharged from service more than 5 years ago . Additionally, only Ex-servicemen from Navy and Coastguard who retired after 01 July 2021 will be eligible for recruitment in OSSF of Odisha Marine Police. The age limit varies by rank at the time of retirement from Navy/Coastguard: Candidates must hold medical category S1A1 . The character of the applicant must be graded as Exemplary in their service records. For Master, Engine Driver, and Syrang posts: Course grading of Grade-I is required. For Dingy Driver and Seaman Mechanic posts: Course grading of Grade-I or Grade-II is accepted.

content_sections.heading: Salary – Monthly Contractual Remuneration
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a fixed monthly contractual remuneration as specified in the notification. The pay differs by post category and is not subject to standard government pay scales since these are contractual appointments.

content_sections.heading: Contract Period and Terms
content_sections.text: Appointments under this recruitment are purely contractual. Candidates considering this opportunity should clearly understand the nature and duration of employment before applying. The initial contract period is three years . The contract may be extended further based on the candidate's performance, ability, sincerity, and devotion to duty. These appointments are on a purely contractual basis — there is no implication of permanent employment.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must bring original documents along with self-attested photocopies at the time of recruitment on 6th and 7th July 2026. Missing even one document may result in disqualification at the venue. PPO (Pension Payment Order) Discharge Book ESM (Ex-Servicemen) ID Card and Aadhaar Card 3 colour passport-size photographs Original bank account passbook in which pension is credited Course certificate relevant to the branch applied for

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: The application process for Odisha Police OSSF Ex-Servicemen recruitment 2026 requires candidates to submit a bio data and service particulars by post. There is no online application portal for this recruitment. Follow the steps below carefully. Prepare your bio data / service particulars covering your name, rank, branch, date of discharge, age, contact details, and relevant service experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents listed in the Documents Required section above. Address the application envelope and send it to: O/o Addl. D.G. of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar Ensure the application reaches the office by 1 July 2026 . Late applications will not be considered. Attend the recruitment event in person at OSAP 7th Battalion, Bhubaneswar on 6th or 7th July 2026 at 09:00 AM with all original documents and self-attested copies. O/o Additional Director General of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar. OSAP 7th Battalion, Bhubaneswar. Nearest railway station: Bhubaneswar.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Many eligible Ex-servicemen miss out or get disqualified due to avoidable errors. Based on the notification's requirements, here are the key pitfalls to watch out for: Applying after 5 years of discharge: The notification clearly states applicants must not have been discharged from service for more than 5 years. If you were discharged before 1 July 2021, you are not eligible. Wrong branch for the post: Each post requires a specific branch background — for example, Engine Driver needs Engineering/Electrical branch, while Master needs Seaman branch MCPO/CPO rank. Applying for a mismatched post leads to rejection. Not carrying original documents to the venue: Only self-attested copies are not sufficient. Originals must also be presented at the time of recruitment on 6th/7th July 2026. Forgetting the pension bank passbook: The original bank passbook where pension is credited is a mandatory document. Not having it at the venue can disqualify your candidature. Incorrect course grading: Master, Engine Driver, and Syrang posts require Grade-I. Candidates with only Grade-II are not eligible for these posts (only Dingy Driver and Seaman Mechanic accept Grade-II). Sending applications to the wrong address: Applications must reach the O/o Addl. DG of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar. Applications sent elsewhere will not be considered. Not appearing at the venue on time: The recruitment starts at 09:00 AM. Arriving late may mean you miss your slot. Plan travel well in advance — Bhubaneswar railway station is the nearest rail access point.

rows.details: Odisha Police Coastal Security Headquarters, Rasulgarh, Bhubaneswar – 751010
O/o Addl. D.G. of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Odisha Police OSSF Ex-Servicemen Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application (bio data and service particulars) for Odisha Police OSSF Marine technical posts is 1 July 2026. The application must reach the O/o Addl. D.G. of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar by this date.

faq.question: Q2. When and where is the Odisha Marine Police OSSF recruitment 2026 scheduled?
faq.answer: The recruitment (in-person selection) is scheduled on 6th and 7th July 2026 at OSAP 7th Battalion, Bhubaneswar, starting at 09:00 AM. Candidates must report with all original documents and self-attested copies on one of these dates.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in Odisha Police OSSF 2026?
faq.answer: Approximately 120 technical posts are available across five categories: Master (20), Syrang (20), Engine Driver (40), Dingy Driver (25), and Seaman Mechanic (15). The vacancy count may subsequently be varied by the organization.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for Odisha Police Marine Police OSSF recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only Ex-Navy and Ex-Coastguard personnel with experience in the Seaman, Communication, Engineering, or Electrical branches are eligible. Applicants must have retired after 01 July 2021 and must not have been discharged from service for more than 5 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Odisha OSSF recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit depends on the rank at retirement: 43 years for Seaman II and Seaman, 50 years for NCO, and 54 years for JCO.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Odisha Marine Police OSSF technical posts?
faq.answer: The monthly contractual remuneration is: Master – Rs. 55,000; Syrang and Engine Driver – Rs. 50,000 each; Dingy Driver and Seaman Mechanic – Rs. 45,000 each.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for Odisha Police OSSF recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry originals and self-attested copies of: PPO, Discharge Book, ESM ID Card, Aadhaar Card, 3 passport-size colour photographs, original bank passbook (where pension is credited), and course certificate relevant to the branch applied for.

faq.question: Q8. What is the contract period for Odisha Marine Police OSSF posts?
faq.answer: The appointment is on a purely contractual basis for three years. The contract may be extended further based on the candidate's performance, ability, sincerity, and devotion to duty.

faq.question: Q9. What is the medical category requirement for Odisha Police OSSF recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold medical category S1A1. Additionally, character must be graded as Exemplary in service records.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send my application for Odisha Police OSSF Ex-Servicemen Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications (bio data with service particulars and self-attested document copies) must be sent to: O/o Additional Director General of Police, Railways and Coastal Security, Odisha, Bhubaneswar so as to reach by 1 July 2026. For queries, email [email protected] or call 0674-2311110.
